properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In times like these you need a Saviour, In times like these you need an anchor Be very sure, be very sure, Your anchor holds and grips the solid rock.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This rock is Jesus, Yes, He's the One, This rock is Jesus, the only One; Be very sure, be very sure, Your anchor holds and grips the solid rock.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In times like these you need the Bible, In times like these oh be not idle, Be very sure, be very sure, Your anchor holds and grips the solid rock.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In times like these, I have a Saviour, In times like these, I have an anchor, I'm very sure, I'm very sure, My anchor holds and grips the solid rock.
